unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: What is happening in different time zones around the world right now?
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 联想记忆：a(在) + round(周围) + the + world(世界) = 在世界的周围，即遍及世界各地。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Some people are rushing to get home from work.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 谐音记忆：拼音“ru”(入) + “sh”(水) -> 扑通一声“冲”入水中。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: But others are not in a hurry!
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 谐音记忆：hurry 发音像“哈里”，哈里王子总是很“匆忙”。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Lights are shining brightly across the city, and colourful boats are moving slowly down the river.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 谐音记忆：发音类似“晒嗯”，阳光“晒”在身上“嗯嗯”很舒服，表示发光照耀。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: People are eating delicious food, such as Chongqing hot pot and noodles.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 词根拆解：such (这样的) + as (像) -> 像这样的事物，也就是“例如”。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Some people are shopping for gifts, such as paintings and bags, in the markets.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 词根词缀法：paint (动词：画) + ing (名词后缀) = 绘画作品。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Many people are rushing to the subway.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 词根词缀法：sub (在...下面) + way (路) -> 在地下面走的路，即“地铁”。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Bright yellow taxis are picking up and dropping off passengers.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 联想拆解：pass (经过) + en + ger (表示人) -> 只是经过这辆车/这趟旅程的人，就是“乘客”。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Can you explain how it can be daytime in one city when it is nighttime in another city?
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 词根前缀：ex (向外) + plain (平坦的/清楚的) -> 把事情向外摊平、说清楚，也就是“解释”。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Our family are taking part in a boat tour right now.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 图像记忆：拿 (take) 出你的一部分 (part) 投入到 (in) 活动里面，就是“参加”了这项活动。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Our family are taking part in a boat tour right now.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 谐音记忆：读音近似“兔儿”，联想自己跟着一只小兔儿(tour)去野外“旅行”。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: What are you doing right now?
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 逻辑记忆：right (正好，强调语气) + now (现在) -> 正好是现在，即“立刻，现在”。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Some people are jogging, walking, and riding bikes in Central Park.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 字母联想：r (人) + ide (近似 idea 想法) -> 人一有想法就“骑”车出去兜风。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: What are you doing at the moment?
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 谐音拆解：mo (摸) + men (门) + t (头) -> 记住你摸门头的那个“时刻”。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Are you making them for the Dragon Boat Festival?
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 词中词法：drag (拖拉) + on (在...上) -> 神话中的龙在天上飞时，像拖着长长的尾巴在天上 (on) 一样。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: It's great to hear your voice!
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 联想记忆：v (胜利手势) + oice (像 ice 冰) -> 他的“嗓音”像冰一样清脆动听，总能带来胜利。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Would you like to leave a message?
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 词根联想：mess (混乱) + age (时代) -> 在这个信息大爆炸的混乱时代，我们每天都会收到无数的“消息”。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: What is happening in different time zones around the world right now?
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 谐音联想：hap (好怕) + pen (笔) -> 考试时好怕笔突然没墨这种事情“发生”。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Can you explain how it can be daytime in one city when it is nighttime in another city?
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 合成词记忆：day (白天) + time (时间) = 白天的时间，即“白天”。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Can you explain how it can be daytime in one city when it is nighttime in another city?
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 合成词记忆：night (夜晚) + time (时间) = 夜晚的时间，即“夜间”。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: It's tricky, but I think I'm making good progress.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 词根词缀法：pro (向前) + gress (走) -> 一直向前走，就是在不断“进步”。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: It's tricky, but I think I'm making good progress.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 词根联想：trick (恶作剧/诡计) + y (形容词后缀) -> 像恶作剧一样让人“难办的，棘手的”。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: It's so powerful!
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 词根词缀：power (力量) + ful (充满...的) -> 充满了力量的，也就是“强大的”。
